MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-15-2004. PARTIES AND COUNSEL ATTENDED A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THE DAY OF TRIAL WITH JPT RICHARD WARREN. A CONTINUANCE, REQUESTED BY DEFENDANTS, WAS AGREED UPON BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL-CONDITIONED UPON THE PARTIES SELECTING A MEDIATOR AND BEGINNING A MEDIATION PROCESS. (ALSO, A RELATED CASE MAY BE RESOLVED BY 2/04 WHICH WILL EFFECT THE OUTCOME OF THIS CASE.) THE COURT GRANTED CONTINUANCE BASED ON PRO TEM'S RECOMMENDATION. ON THE RECORD, CASE CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON FEB-22-2005 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. JPT RICHARD WARREN, REPORTER: DEBORAH NEVILLE, CLERK: DIANNE HAKEWILL.
